commonIssues:
Incorrect spellings in documents, mismatched addresses on ID proofs, or missing affidavits.

How to fix:

  • Verify names and addresses on all proofs before applying.

Users often report problems with the official MP e-Nagar Palika portal, including uploading documents or slow website performance.

How to fix:

  • Use the MP e-Nagar Palika Portal during off-peak hours and ensure PDFs are under 2MB.

Last-minute issues arranging two adult witnesses with valid ID proof.

How to fix:

  • Coordinate with two adult witnesses who have valid local IDs to accompany you for physical verification.

Applying in the wrong district or local body (Municipal Corporation/Panchayat).

How to fix:

  • Select the correct Municipal Corporation or Panchayat based on your permanent residential address.

Assuming online submission is enough; however, in-person verification with the registrar is mandatory.

How to fix:

  • Remember that online submission is only step one. You must visit the registrar for physical verification.

Failing to apply within the designated time frame, which requires a late fee or an affidavit explaining the delay.

How to fix:

  • Register on time. If late, submit an affidavit explaining the delay and pay the late fee.

While a certificate can take 3-7 days in some areas, it often takes longer (15-30 days) due to verification hurdles.

How to fix:

  • Track your application online via the MP e-District Portal and follow up physically if delayed over 15 days.

Mismatches in the issued certificate, such as misspelled names or incorrect marriage dates, which require a separate amendment process.

How to fix:

  • Apply for an amendment online or submit a written request to the registrar with correct proofs.

Need for in-person appearance by the couple and witnesses at the Sub-Registrar’s office, even after online application.

How to fix:

  • Schedule your appointment carefully so both partners and witnesses can be present together.

Difficulties in collecting the physical, sealed certificate from the office after online approval.

How to fix:

  • Download the digitally signed certificate from the portal if the physical copy is delayed.
